title: Create a new resume from the dashboard and land in the editor
description: Verifies a user can create a new resume from /dashboard and is redirected into the resume editor.

steps.description: Click on "Dashboard" in the app navigation
Type "QA Resume - New" into the resume name field

title: Dashboard lists resumes as visible cards
description: Verifies the dashboard renders a visible list of resume cards for an authenticated user.

steps.description: Click on "Dashboard" in the app navigation
Verify text "Create New Resume" is visible

title: Open an existing resume card to the editor
description: Verifies clicking an existing resume card opens the resume in the editor.

steps.description: Click on "Dashboard" in the app navigation
Click on the first visible resume card

title: Attempt to create a resume without a name shows validation
description: Verifies the create-resume flow prevents submission when the resume name is empty.

steps.description: Click on "Dashboard" in the app navigation

title: Delete a resume from a card menu removes it from the dashboard list
description: Verifies a resume can be deleted from the dashboard card menu and is no longer shown afterward.

steps.description: Click on "Dashboard" in the app navigation
Click the resume card menu for the first visible resume card

title: Edit contact info and verify auto-save success indication
description: Verifies that editing a contact info field in the Resume Editor triggers an auto-save and shows a visible saved confirmation.

steps.description: Type "QA User" into the contact name field

title: Switch resume template and verify template applied instantly
description: Verifies that switching templates in the editor applies immediately with a visible change.

steps.description: Click on the "Templates" control in the editor
Click on a different template option than the currently selected one

title: Open AI tool sheet, generate content, and verify results appear
description: Verifies that an AI tool opens, accepts a job description, generates results, and displays them in the sheet.

steps.description: Click on an "AI" tool button in the editor
Type "We are seeking a frontend engineer with React, TypeScript, and testing experience." into the job description field

title: Edit experience section and verify auto-save triggers
description: Verifies that editing an experience entry triggers auto-save and a visible saved status is shown.

steps.description: Type "Improved E2E coverage by 30%." into an experience bullet/description field

title: Use Undo after an edit and verify content reverts
description: Verifies that undo reverts the most recent edit in the editor.

steps.description: Type "Temporary summary text" into the summary field
Verify text "Temporary summary text" is not visible

title: Use Redo after undo and verify content returns
description: Verifies that redo restores the change after an undo action.

steps.description: Type "Redo validation line" into the summary field
Verify text "Redo validation line" is visible

title: AI tool validation: attempt generate with empty job description
description: Verifies the AI tool prevents generation and shows a visible validation message when job description is empty.

steps.description: Click on an "AI" tool button in the editor
Verify text "Job description is required" is visible

title: Access Upload page and see upload control
description: Verifies the authenticated user can open the Resume Upload page and sees the upload entry point.

title: Open an AI tool and generate results from a job description
description: Verifies a user can open an AI tool sheet from AI Studio, submit context, and see AI results displayed.

steps.description: Click on "AI Studio" in the main navigation
Click a tool card that indicates it accepts a job description (for example, "Job Analysis" or "Tailor")
Type "We are looking for a Frontend Engineer with React, TypeScript, testing, and performance optimization experience." into the job description text area
Verify an element containing AI output content is visible

title: Browse AI tool cards and open/close a tool sheet without generating
description: Verifies AI Studio tool discovery works and a tool sheet can be opened and dismissed.

steps.description: Click on "AI Studio" in the main navigation
Verify at least one AI tool card is visible
Verify the tool sheet or tool panel is visible
Verify the tool sheet or tool panel is not visible

title: Attempt to generate with empty context shows validation or remains disabled
description: Verifies the tool prevents submission when required text inputs are empty.

steps.description: Click on "AI Studio" in the main navigation
Click a tool card that requires text input (for example, "ATS Scan" or "Job Analysis")
Verify the main input field (for example, "Job Description" or "Resume") is visible
Verify AI results content is not visible

title: Generate results with long job description input
description: Verifies the tool can accept a long job description and still returns visible results.

steps.description: Click on "AI Studio" in the main navigation
Click a tool card that accepts a job description (for example, "Job Analysis")

Type "Job Summary: We need a React + TypeScript engineer. Responsibilities: build UI components, improve performance, write unit and e2e tests, integrate APIs, collaborate with designers. Requirements: React 18, TypeScript, testing experience, accessibility, CI/CD familiarity, ability to debug production issues, strong communication. Nice to have: Tailwind, Zustand, TanStack Query, Vite." into the job description text area
Verify an element containing AI output content is visible
Verify text related to analysis (for example, "skills" or "recommendations") is visible

title: Switch between two different AI tool sheets
description: Verifies a user can open one tool sheet, close it, then open a different tool sheet from the AI Studio cards.

steps.description: Click on "AI Studio" in the main navigation
Click a tool card labeled "ATS Scan"
Verify the tool sheet or tool panel is not visible
Click a tool card labeled "Agentic Chat"

title: Mock Interview page loads and allows selecting an interview mode
description: Verifies the Interview page is accessible after authentication and the user can select an interview mode option.

steps.description: Click on "Interview" in the main navigation
Select "General" from the interview mode options

title: Launch a General mock interview session successfully
description: Verifies a user can launch an interview session and the interview UI enters an active state with conversation area available.

steps.description: Click on "Interview" in the main navigation
Select "General" from the interview mode options

title: Launch a Job-targeted mock interview mode
description: Verifies job-targeted mode can be selected and launched from the Interview page.

steps.description: Click on "Interview" in the main navigation
Select "Job-targeted" from the interview mode options

title: Launch a Quick practice mock interview mode
description: Verifies quick practice mode can be selected and launched from the Interview page.

steps.description: Click on "Interview" in the main navigation
Select "Quick practice" from the interview mode options

title: Answer by typing (no microphone) and see it appear in the transcript
description: Verifies the user can type an answer instead of speaking and the conversation transcript updates visibly.

steps.description: Click on "Interview" in the main navigation
Type "Here is my answer to the interview question." into the answer input field

title: Transcript area is visible during an interview session
description: Verifies the transcript/conversation area is visible once an interview is launched.

steps.description: Click on "Interview" in the main navigation

title: Save portfolio with available username, visibility ON, and updated bio/social links
description: Verifies a user can choose an available username, enable portfolio visibility, update bio and social links, and successfully save changes.

steps.description: Click on the portfolio visibility toggle to turn it on
Type "Career-focused portfolio bio for UI test." into the bio field

title: Username taken error then update username and re-check availability
description: Verifies the editor shows a clear error for a taken username and allows re-checking after changing it.

title: Toggle portfolio visibility OFF and save
description: Verifies a user can disable portfolio visibility and save the change successfully.

steps.description: Click on the portfolio visibility toggle to turn it off

title: Switch portfolio theme/layout and save
description: Verifies theme/layout can be changed in the portfolio editor and saved successfully.

title: Prevent saving when username is empty
description: Verifies the editor blocks saving and shows a visible validation message when the username field is blank.

title: Show validation for invalid username format
description: Verifies the editor shows a visible validation message when username contains invalid characters.

steps.description: Type "bad name!" into the username field

title: Edit social links with invalid URL and verify inline error
description: Verifies the editor detects invalid social link URLs and shows a visible error message before/after attempting to save.

title: Verify saved portfolio settings persist after page refresh
description: Verifies that after saving changes, reloading the page shows the updated username/bio still visible in the editor.

steps.description: Type "Persisted bio content for verification." into the bio field
Verify text "Persisted bio content for verification." is visible

title: Update profile fields and save successfully
description: Verifies an authenticated user can edit profile fields on Settings and save changes successfully.

steps.description: Click on "Settings" in the app navigation
Click on the profile "Full name" (or equivalent) field
Type "Test User" into the profile name field

title: Change theme to Dark and verify it applies
description: Verifies a user can change appearance theme to Dark from Settings and the UI reflects the change.

steps.description: Click on "Settings" in the app navigation
Click on the theme setting control

title: Theme change persists when navigating away and back
description: Verifies the selected theme remains applied after leaving Settings and returning within the same session.

steps.description: Click on "Settings" in the app navigation
Click on the theme setting control
Click on "Dashboard" in the app navigation
Click on "Settings" in the app navigation

title: Enter invalid BYOK AI key and verify connection test error message
description: Verifies an invalid Bring-Your-Own-Key AI key shows a clear error when testing the AI connection.

steps.description: Click on "Settings" in the app navigation
Click on the "AI key" (or "BYOK key") input field
Type "invalid-key-123" into the AI key field

title: Set ElevenLabs voice key and verify it is accepted/saved
description: Verifies a user can enter an ElevenLabs voice key in Settings and save it successfully.

steps.description: Click on "Settings" in the app navigation
Click on the "ElevenLabs key" input field
Type "elevenlabs_test_key" into the ElevenLabs key field

title: Sign out from Settings and verify user returns to auth page
description: Verifies a user can sign out from Settings and is returned to the authentication page.

steps.description: Click on "Settings" in the app navigation

title: Preview page loads and shows resume preview content
description: Ensures the resume preview page renders and displays visible preview content to the user.

title: Create, generate, edit, and save a new cover letter (happy path)
description: Verifies a user can generate an AI cover letter from a job description, edit it, save it, and then see it in the cover letter list.

steps.description: Click on the email input field
Click on the password input field

title: Navigate to Cover Letters list and start creating a new cover letter
description: Verifies a signed-in user can reach the cover letter list and open the new cover letter creation page.

steps.description: Click on the email input field
Click on the password input field
Click on "Cover Letters" in the main navigation

title: Generate a cover letter and verify generated content is shown before saving
description: Verifies AI generation produces visible cover letter content on the new cover letter page.

steps.description: Click on the email input field
Click on the password input field
Click on "Cover Letters" in the main navigation

title: Full end-to-end create flow: generate, edit, save, and confirm appears in list
description: Verifies the complete workflow for creating a cover letter including generation, editing, saving, and confirming it appears in the list view.

steps.description: Click on the email input field
Click on the password input field
Click on "Cover Letters" in the main navigation

title: Generate without required inputs shows validation and does not proceed
description: Verifies the user cannot generate a cover letter without providing required fields like job description and/or position.

steps.description: Click on the email input field
Click on the password input field
Click on "Cover Letters" in the main navigation

title: Edit generated cover letter content before saving updates the visible draft
description: Verifies edits made after generation are reflected in the on-screen cover letter editor prior to saving.

steps.description: Click on the email input field
Click on the password input field
Click on "Cover Letters" in the main navigation
Fill "Frontend Engineer" into the position field
Fill "Looking for React, TypeScript, and testing experience." into the job description field
Verify element "cover letter editor" is visible

title: Save is blocked when no generated cover letter content exists
description: Verifies the user cannot save a cover letter before generating or entering content.

steps.description: Click on the email input field
Click on the password input field
Click on "Cover Letters" in the main navigation

title: Complete onboarding successfully and land on dashboard
description: Verifies a signed-in user can complete all onboarding steps and is redirected to the dashboard at the end.

steps.description: Click the "Onboarding" link or button (if presented) to open onboarding

title: Advance from career level step to the next onboarding step
description: Verifies selecting a career level and clicking Next advances to the following onboarding step.

steps.description: Verify text "Next" is visible on a subsequent onboarding step (indicating progression)

title: Finish onboarding redirects to dashboard
description: Verifies clicking Finish on the final onboarding step routes the user to the dashboard.

steps.description: Click the "Next" button until the "Finish" button is visible

title: Dashboard is visible after onboarding completion
description: Verifies the dashboard page loads and shows dashboard content after onboarding completion.

steps.description: Click the "Next" button until the "Finish" button is visible
